title: Gallery: stale thumbnail sticks on card after Stop-at-completion
description: A gallery card shows the WRONG thumbnail (a latent-preview blob or final image from a DIFFERENT earlier generation) while its own metadata (filename, dimensions) is correct. Triggered by pressing STOP on a Cue job right as it completes (surfaced by MPI-74 P6 two-lane concurrency, but the bug is in the gallery render-reuse diff, NOT in the concurrency code). The stale image is sticky: it does NOT refresh on size-slider resize, new generation, project reopen, or opening a DIFFERENT card's history and returning. It ONLY clears when the user opens THAT card's OWN history workspace and returns to the gallery. Root cause is in MpiGalleryGrid card caching/signature-diff (_cardMap keyed by group.id + _getGroupRenderKey + the _swapThumbToImage early-return + _stabilizedIds), or a preview blob leaking across the placeholder->saved-card transition. App-only, frontend, no backend/image change. READ rules + docs + memory BEFORE grepping (see brief.md). See brief.md.
